title: Mega Slowbro Battle Guide
summary: A 180 Defense physical fortress that uses [calm-mind] to transition into a special sweeper. [shell-armor] removes critical hits so setup turns are guaranteed.
strengths: 180 Defense is the highest physical stat in the metagame
[calm-mind] boosts both SpA and SpD for dual-role value
weaknesses: Pre-Mega turn runs [regenerator] with different dynamics

recommendedMoves.reason: Setup that boosts SpA and SpD together

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternatives

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Slowbro is a 180 Defense physical fortress that uses [calm-mind] to convert its staying power into offense. [shell-armor] removes critical hits, so every setup turn is guaranteed safe against random variance. Unlike the base form [regenerator] pivot, the Mega set is an anchor that stays on the field and sweeps with boosted [scald] and [psychic] after accumulating [calm-mind] stacks.

## Strengths
180 Defense is the [sing]le highest stat in the metagame physical-wall pool — no unboosted physical attack threatens a KO. [shell-armor] negates critical hit RNG during setup, which is critical when the plan revolves a[round] stacking [calm-mind] boosts. One [calm-mind] pushes SpA and SpD into finisher range, and [slack-off] keeps the HP bar topped up across a long match.

## Weaknesses & Answers
[Bug], [Ghost], [Dark], [Electric], and [Grass] are all 2x weaknesses and unchanged after Mega Evolution. [knock-off] is a lesser concern (the mega stone is immune to removal), but the damage itself still connects. Speed 30 is the fundamental limit — [taunt] users and fast setup sweepers race past the [calm-mind] plan. The pre-Mega turn runs [regenerator], which changes the first-turn dynamics.

## Recommended Moveset
[scald] is the locked [Water] STAB for burn utility against physical attackers. [psychic] is the [Psychic] STAB finisher that becomes lethal after [calm-mind] boosts. [calm-mind] is the win condition — one use turns Mega Slowbro from a wall into a true special attacker, and two stacks make it uncatchable. [slack-off] is the [recover]y slot that sustains the plan.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[slowbronite] is the only item because the Mega Stone is mandatory. [shell-armor] is locked post-evolution. Tera [Water] keeps STAB intact for the [scald] burn chance, while Tera [Fairy] flips [Bug] and [Dark] weaknesses into resistances, which is usually more valuable in setup turns. Offensive Tera picks are rare because the set revolves a[round] bulk.

## Teammates & Synergy
Mega Slowbro anchors a balance core that needs [Fairy] or [Steel] partners for the [Dark] and [Bug] weaknesses and a [Ground] partner for the [Electric] weakness. A priority [block]er or [taunt] lead answers the oppo[sing] setup sweepers that would otherwise race past Mega Slowbro. A cleaner behind it finishes weakened targets after the [calm-mind] sweep runs out of PP.

## Play Patterns
Mega Evolve into a predicted physical attack, [calm-mind] on the free turn, then [scald] and [psychic] through the oppo[sing] team while [slack-off] keeps HP stable. Save Tera for a telegraphed [Dark] or [Bug] move, and stack a second [calm-mind] when the matchup allows it.
